scripts.desktop:dev: npm run prepare:ffmpeg && npm run prepare:hardware-monitor && npm run prepare:pawnio && tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: npm run prepare:ffmpeg && npm run prepare:hardware-monitor && npm run prepare:pawnio && tauri build
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo check --locked --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run check:versions && npm run build && npm run check:rust
